description: Use this API to apply the MAPP MW-mile calculation . This API routine was first introduced in release 30.0.0. ierr = mwmi(sid, all, status, values, inpfile, trnfile, outfile)
python_syntax: ierr = mwmi(sid, all, status, values, inpfile, trnfile, outfile)

parameters.name: sid
parameters.description: A valid area subsystem identifier. valid subsystem identifiers range from 0 to 11. area subsystem sid must have been previously defined. (input; 0 by default).

parameters.name: all
parameters.description: All areas or specified subsystem flag. (input; 1 by default).

parameters.name: status
parameters.description: An array of four elements specifying solution options. (input).

parameters.name: values
parameters.description: An array of three elements specifying solution parameters. (input).

parameters.name: inpfile
parameters.description: Name of mwmi data file. (input; no default allowed).

parameters.name: trnfile
parameters.description: Name of the transactions raw data file; blank for none. (input; blank by default).

parameters.name: outfile
parameters.description: Name of the detailed branch output file; blank for none. (input; blank by default).

all.description: only areas in area subsystem SID are in the pool.
all areas are in the pool.

status.description: rating used (default rating set program option setting by default).
option to list data (0 by default).
option to include buyer and seller branches in the detailed branch output file (0 by default).
action code if the MW mismatch exceeds 0.5 MW (0 by default).

values.description: percent load reduction for calculating capacity for serving load (10.0 by default).
MW for each transaction; used when no transactions data file is specified (10.0 by default).
distribution factor threshold for detailed branch (0.0 by default).

error_codes.description: invalid SID value or subsystem SID is not defined.
buses in island(s) without a swing bus; use activity TREE.
prerequisite requirements for API are not met.
